endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients
endpoints.description: Lists all the clients for the current sponsor buyer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients
endpoints.description: Creates a new client buyer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}
endpoints.description: Gets a client buyer with a given client account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing client buyer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/invitations
endpoints.description: Lists all the client users invitations for a client with a given account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/invitations
endpoints.description: Creates and sends out an email invitation to access an Ad Exchange client buyer account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/invitations/{invitationId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an existing client user invitation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INVITATIONID}} with a real invitationid. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/users
endpoints.description: Lists all the known client users for a specified sponsor buyer account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an existing client user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/clients/{clientAccountId}/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing client user. Only the user status can be changed on update.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CLIENTACCOUNTID}} with a real clientaccountid. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives
endpoints.description: Lists creatives.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives
endpoints.description: Creates a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}
endpoints.description: Gets a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}
endpoints.description: Updates a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}/dealAssociations
endpoints.description: List all creative-deal associations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}/dealAssociations:add
endpoints.description: Associate an existing deal with a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}/dealAssociations:remove
endpoints.description: Remove the association between a deal and a creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}:stopWatching
endpoints.description: Stops watching a creative. Will stop push notifications being sent to the topics when the creative changes status.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/creatives/{creativeId}:watch
endpoints.description: Watches a creative. Will result in push notifications being sent to the topic when the creative changes status.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{CREATIVEID}} with a real creativeid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/finalizedProposals
endpoints.description: List finalized proposals, regardless if a proposal is being renegotiated. A filter expression (PQL query) may be specified to filter the results. The notes will not be returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/finalizedProposals/{proposalId}:pause
endpoints.description: Update given deals to pause serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to true for all listed deals in the request. Currently, this method only applies to PG and PD deals. For PA deals, call accounts.proposals.pause endpoint. It is a no-op to pause already-paused deals. It is an error to call PauseProposalDeals for deals which are not part of the proposal of proposal_id or which are not finalized or renegotiating.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/finalizedProposals/{proposalId}:resume
endpoints.description: Update given deals to resume serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to false for all listed deals in the request. Currently, this method only applies to PG and PD deals. For PA deals, call accounts.proposals.resume endpoint. It is a no-op to resume running deals or deals paused by the other party. It is an error to call ResumeProposalDeals for deals which are not part of the proposal of proposal_id or which are not finalized or renegotiating.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/products
endpoints.description: List all products visible to the buyer (optionally filtered by the specified PQL query).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/products/{productId}
endpoints.description: Gets the requested product by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals
endpoints.description: List proposals. A filter expression (PQL query) may be specified to filter the results. To retrieve all finalized proposals, regardless if a proposal is being renegotiated, see the FinalizedProposals resource. Note that Bidder/ChildSeat relationships differ from the usual behavior. A Bidder account can only see its child seats' proposals by specifying the ChildSeat's accountId in the request path.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals
endpoints.description: Create the given proposal. Each created proposal and any deals it contains are assigned a unique ID by the server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}
endpoints.description: Gets a proposal given its ID. The proposal is returned at its head revision.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}
endpoints.description: Update the given proposal at the client known revision number. If the server revision has advanced since the passed-in `proposal.proposal_revision`, an `ABORTED` error message will be returned. Only the buyer-modifiable fields of the proposal will be updated. Note that the deals in the proposal will be updated to match the passed-in copy. If a passed-in deal does not have a `deal_id`, the server will assign a new unique ID and create the deal. If passed-in deal has a `deal_id`, it will be updated to match the passed-in copy. Any existing deals not present in the passed-in proposal will be deleted. It is an error to pass in a deal with a `deal_id` not present at head.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:accept
endpoints.description: Mark the proposal as accepted at the given revision number. If the number does not match the server's revision number an `ABORTED` error message will be returned. This call updates the proposal_state from `PROPOSED` to `BUYER_ACCEPTED`, or from `SELLER_ACCEPTED` to `FINALIZED`. Upon calling this endpoint, the buyer implicitly agrees to the terms and conditions optionally set within the proposal by the publisher.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:addNote
endpoints.description: Create a new note and attach it to the proposal. The note is assigned a unique ID by the server. The proposal revision number will not increase when associated with a new note.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:cancelNegotiation
endpoints.description: Cancel an ongoing negotiation on a proposal. This does not cancel or end serving for the deals if the proposal has been finalized, but only cancels a negotiation unilaterally.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:completeSetup
endpoints.description: You can opt-in to manually update proposals to indicate that setup is complete. By default, proposal setup is automatically completed after their deals are finalized. Contact your Technical Account Manager to opt in. Buyers can call this method when the proposal has been finalized, and all the required creatives have been uploaded using the Creatives API. This call updates the `is_setup_completed` field on the deals in the proposal, and notifies the seller. The server then advances the revision number of the most recent proposal. To mark an individual deal as ready to serve, call `buyers.finalizedDeals.setReadyToServe` in the Marketplace API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:pause
endpoints.description: Update the given proposal to pause serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to true for all deals in the proposal. It is a no-op to pause an already-paused proposal. It is an error to call PauseProposal for a proposal that is not finalized or renegotiating.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/proposals/{proposalId}:resume
endpoints.description: Update the given proposal to resume serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to false for all deals in the proposal. Note that if the `has_seller_paused` bit is also set, serving will not resume until the seller also resumes. It is a no-op to resume an already-running proposal. It is an error to call ResumeProposal for a proposal that is not finalized or renegotiating.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROPOSALID}} with a real proposalid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/publisherProfiles
endpoints.description: List all publisher profiles visible to the buyer
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/accounts/{accountId}/publisherProfiles/{publisherProfileId}
endpoints.description: Gets the requested publisher profile by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PUBLISHERPROFILEID}} with a real publisherprofileid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/bidMetrics
endpoints.description: Lists all metrics that are measured in terms of number of bids.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/bidResponseErrors
endpoints.description: List all errors that occurred in bid responses, with the number of bid responses affected for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/bidResponsesWithoutBids
endpoints.description: List all reasons for which bid responses were considered to have no applicable bids, with the number of bid responses affected for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/filteredBidRequests
endpoints.description: List all reasons that caused a bid request not to be sent for an impression, with the number of bid requests not sent for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/filteredBids
endpoints.description: List all reasons for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/filteredBids/{creativeStatusId}/creatives
endpoints.description: List all creatives associated with a specific reason for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each creative.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CREATIVESTATUSID}} with a real creativestatusid. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/filteredBids/{creativeStatusId}/details
endpoints.description: List all details associated with a specific reason for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each detail.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CREATIVESTATUSID}} with a real creativestatusid. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/impressionMetrics
endpoints.description: Lists all metrics that are measured in terms of number of impressions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/losingBids
endpoints.description: List all reasons for which bids lost in the auction, with the number of bids that lost for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{filterSetName}/nonBillableWinningBids
endpoints.description: List all reasons for which winning bids were not billable, with the number of bids not billed for each reason.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERSETNAME}} with a real filtersetname.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the requested filter set for the account with the given account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes the requested filter set from the account with the given account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2beta1/{ownerName}/filterSets
endpoints.description: Lists all filter sets for the account with the given account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OWNERNAME}} with a real ownername.

endpoints.name: POST /v2beta1/{ownerName}/filterSets
endpoints.description: Creates the specified filter set for the account with the given account ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OWNERNAME}} with a real ownername.
